summary: Implementation review accepts low-risk write-pre candidate selection, draft/preview fixture metadata, registry query output, and validator coverage for Lode #187/#188/#189/#190.
reviewed_validation_summary: `python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py`; `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item LODE-187 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item LODE-187 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item LODE-187 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The candidate fixture is refs-only, redacted, and keeps no-submit active with true-write blocked.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Validator and package fixture checks pass locally; no raw Harbor material or true write behavior is introduced.
